properties.name: campfinder.email.provider
properties.description: Email transport provider. 'mailpit' uses JavaMailSender over SMTP (local dev); 'postmark' uses the Postmark HTTP API (production).

properties.name: campfinder.polling.interval-ms
properties.description: How often the availability scheduler polls Recreation.gov, in milliseconds.

properties.name: campfinder.checker.thread-pool-size
properties.description: Thread pool size for concurrent availability checks.

properties.name: campfinder.checker.thread-pool-queue-capacity
properties.description: Bounded queue capacity for the availability checker thread pool.

properties.name: campfinder.outbox.stale-threshold-minutes
properties.description: Notifications older than this many minutes are considered stale and skipped.
